title: T-013 — API: BOM create draft (POST /api/technical/items/:code/boms)
prompt: Implement POST /api/technical/items/[item_code]/boms creating a draft BOM with lines + co_products in one transaction per §7.1 + V-TEC-11..14. Validate: V-TEC-11 sum of components × quantities × (1 + scrap_pct) within ±0.5% of parent yield (warning, not block); V-TEC-12 allocation_pct sum (parent + non-byproduct co_products) = 100.000; V-TEC-13 reject circular BOM (item_id == component_item_id and transitive cycle via DFS over existing active BOMs); V-TEC-14 each component item.status not in ('blocked','draft'). New version = max(existing version)+1. Permission technical.bom.create. RED tests/api/bom-create.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/bom-create.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: BOM create with cycle detection, allocation sum validation, version bump, all transactional.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cycle detection: DFS from current item over active BOMs in same org; component_item_ids are nodes. For self-reference reject early. Allocation guard rounds to 3 decimals. V-TEC-11 returns warning array in response (not 422).
acceptance_criteria: Given item A's BOM where line component is item A, when POST runs, then 422 V-TEC-13.
Given allocations 80+15+0 (byproduct excluded), when POST runs, then 200 because parent 80 + co-product 15 = 95 — must FAIL with 422 V-TEC-12 because non-byproduct sum != 100; coverage sum = 95.
Given component item.status='blocked', when POST runs, then 422 V-TEC-14.
Given valid BOM, when POST runs, then row written and version = previous_max + 1.
test_strategy: RED tests for each V-TEC-12/13/14 path.
risk_red_lines: Do not write a snapshot here — snapshot is WO-time only (T-024).
